questions.question_text: VR technology has 'evolved' from a science fiction dream into a practical tool. What does 'evolved' mean?

options.text: Remained unchanged and identical to its original form
Developed and changed gradually into a more advanced form
Been suddenly replaced by a completely different technology
Disappeared and been abandoned by the technology industry

questions.explanation_ar: evolved تعني تطوّر وتحوّل تدريجياً، أي مرّ بمراحل متتالية من التغيير حتى وصل إلى شكله الحالي الأكثر تقدماً.

questions.question_text: VR is 'reshaping' industries across the globe. What does 'reshaping' mean?

options.text: Keeping industries exactly the same as they have always been
Studying and analysing industries without changing them
Fundamentally changing the structure and form of something
Reducing and shrinking industries to make them more manageable

questions.explanation_ar: reshaping تعني يُعيد تشكيل ويُغيّر جذرياً، أي إحداث تحولات عميقة في طريقة عمل شيء ما أو هيكله الأساسي.

questions.question_text: VR was once considered an 'exclusive' technology only for gaming enthusiasts. What does 'exclusive' mean?

options.text: Available to everyone equally and without any restrictions
Limited to a particular group and not available to others
Extremely expensive but still widely used by the public
Simple and basic enough for beginners to use easily

questions.explanation_ar: exclusive تعني حصري ومقتصر على فئة معينة، أي أن الشيء لا يتاح إلا لأشخاص أو مجموعات محددة.

questions.question_text: VR has become an 'integral' part of modern education and healthcare. What does 'integral' mean?

options.text: An optional extra that can be removed without much effect
A completely separate component that works independently
An essential and necessary part that cannot easily be removed
A minor addition that improves the appearance but not the function

questions.explanation_ar: integral تعني جوهري ولا يتجزأ، أي أن الشيء أصبح ضرورياً بحيث يصعب تصوّر الكل بدونه.

questions.question_text: VR technology has 'caught on' with both businesses and consumers worldwide. What does 'caught on' mean?

options.text: Been rejected and received negatively by most businesses
Become popular and widely accepted by people over time
Been regulated and controlled by international organisations
Struggled and failed to attract attention from mainstream users

questions.explanation_ar: caught on تعني راج وانتشر، أي أن شيئاً ما أصبح شائعاً ومقبولاً على نطاق واسع مع مرور الوقت.

questions.question_text: When VR applications are 'revolutionizing' learning methods, they are making small cosmetic changes that have little real effect.
questions.explanation_ar: خطأ. revolutionizing تعني يُحدث ثورة وتغييراً جذرياً، وهو عكس التعديلات الطفيفة — إذ يعني تحويلاً عميقاً في طريقة عمل الأشياء.

questions.question_text: An 'innovative' approach to education is one that introduces new and creative methods not used before.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. innovative تعني مبتكر وجديد، أي تقديم أساليب أو حلول إبداعية لم تُستخدم من قبل في مجال معين.

questions.question_text: VR technology creates _____ experiences that place students directly inside the subject they are studying.
questions.explanation_ar: immersive تعني غامر ومستوعب كلياً للحواس، أي أن التجربة تشعر المستخدم بأنه داخل بيئة حقيقية بشكل كامل.

questions.question_text: Choose the correct relative pronoun: 'VR is a technology _____ has changed how students learn.'

options.text: who
whom
which
whose

questions.explanation_ar: نستخدم which مع الأشياء والأفكار، وwho مع الأشخاص. VR technology شيء وليس شخصاً، لذا الصحيح which.

questions.question_text: Choose the correct relative pronoun: 'Dr. Al-Mahmoud is the surgeon _____ pioneered VR training in Riyadh.'

options.text: which
who
what
that is

questions.explanation_ar: نستخدم who مع الأشخاص في الجمل الوصفية. Dr. Al-Mahmoud شخص، لذا الصحيح who.

questions.question_text: Which sentence uses 'that' correctly as a relative pronoun?

options.text: The VR headset, that costs $500, is available in most stores.
This is the hospital that first used VR for surgical training.
Dr. Ahmed, that specialises in pain, gave a lecture last week.
The research, that was published yesterday, changed everything.

questions.explanation_ar: that يُستخدم في الجمل الوصفية التعريفية (بدون فاصلة)، ولا يُستخدم في الجمل التوضيحية غير التعريفية (بفاصلة). الخيار b صحيح لأنه جملة تعريفية.

questions.question_text: Identify the relative clause in: 'Students who use VR learn faster than those who rely on books.'

options.text: Students who use VR
who use VR
learn faster
than those who rely on books

questions.explanation_ar: الجملة الوصفية (relative clause) هي who use VR — فهي تصف وتُحدد الطلاب المقصودين وتأتي مباشرة بعد الاسم الموصوف (students).

questions.question_text: The sentence 'This is the VR software which allows surgeons to practise operations' uses the relative pronoun correctly.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. which يُستخدم مع الأشياء (VR software) في الجمل الوصفية التعريفية، وهو استخدام صحيح هنا.

questions.question_text: Match each sentence to the correct relative pronoun that fills the blank.

left_items: The doctor _____ invented this therapy won an international award.
This is the technology _____ is changing medical training.
The hospital _____ I visited has a VR simulation lab.
The student _____ headset broke had to stop the session early.

correct_answer.left: The doctor _____ invented this therapy won an international award.
This is the technology _____ is changing medical training.
The hospital _____ I visited has a VR simulation lab.
The student _____ headset broke had to stop the session early.

questions.explanation_ar: who للأشخاص كفاعلين، which للأشياء، where للأماكن، whose للملكية. كل ضمير وصفي يُختار حسب نوع الاسم الموصوف وعلاقته بالجملة الوصفية.

questions.question_text: According to Passage A, what is the projected value of the global VR market by 2030?

options.text: $47 billion
$67 billion
$87 billion
$107 billion

questions.explanation_ar: ذكر النص أن سوق الواقع الافتراضي العالمي من المتوقع أن يصل إلى 87 مليار دولار بحلول عام 2030.

questions.question_text: According to Passage A, what percentage of information do students retain when learning through VR compared to reading?

options.text: VR: 50% vs reading: 5%
VR: 75% vs reading: 10%
VR: 90% vs reading: 20%
VR: 60% vs reading: 15%

questions.explanation_ar: أفادت الدراسات وفق ما ذكره النص أن الطلاب يحتفظون بـ 75% من المعلومات المكتسبة عبر تجارب الواقع الافتراضي مقارنةً بـ 10% فقط من القراءة التقليدية.

questions.question_text: Passage A says VR in healthcare helps 'patients manage pain and anxiety during medical procedures.' What does this suggest about VR?

options.text: VR replaces all medical treatments and pain management drugs
VR has psychological effects that can reduce discomfort during treatment
VR is only effective for mental health conditions, not physical ones
VR causes more anxiety in patients during medical procedures

questions.explanation_ar: تُضمّن هذه العبارة أن للواقع الافتراضي تأثيراً نفسياً حقيقياً يُخفّف الألم والقلق، مما يجعله أداة علاجية ذات قيمة في البيئات الطبية.

questions.question_text: According to Passage A, students at King Abdulaziz University in Jeddah use VR to explore ancient civilizations and the human body.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. ذكر النص أن طلاب جامعة الملك عبدالعزيز في جدة يستطيعون الآن استكشاف الحضارات القديمة أو السفر عبر الجهاز الدوري للإنسان دون مغادرة الفصل الدراسي.

questions.question_text: According to Passage A, the global VR market is expected to reach $_____ billion by 2030.
questions.explanation_ar: ذكر النص أن سوق الواقع الافتراضي العالمي يُتوقع أن يصل إلى 87 مليار دولار بحلول عام 2030.

questions.question_text: Match each VR application from Passage A to the sector it primarily serves.

left_items: exploring ancient civilizations and body systems in class
rehearsing complex surgical procedures before operating
helping patients manage pain and anxiety during treatment

correct_answer.left: exploring ancient civilizations and body systems in class
rehearsing complex surgical procedures before operating
helping patients manage pain and anxiety during treatment

questions.explanation_ar: وصف النص تطبيقات الواقع الافتراضي في قطاعات متعددة: التعليم العام، والتدريب الطبي، والرعاية الصحية العلاجية، والتعليم الهندسي.
